name: Possible File Transfer Using Finger Detected
description: Detects the execution of `finger.exe`. This Windows utility, designed to display user information on a remote system, can be abused for data transfer and as a rudimentary command-and-control channel. While legitimate use is uncommon, it's suspicious enough to warrant investigation.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'finger.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the finger.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute finger.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which finger.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
